title: Air-Fried Herbs Irish Pasta
description: A creamy and comforting herbal dish featuring red pepper in an air-frying method that's raw-friendly and perfect for a light dinner.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a frying pan, add olive oil, cumin seeds, turmeric powder, and garlic. Sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add diced red pepper to the pan. Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes or until peppers are soft but not mushy.
Stir in cooked pasta with some cooking water if necessary. Mix well with the spicy red pepper mixture.
In a bowl, mix Greek yogurt with chopped chives and drizzle with extra olive oil as desired.
Transfer the pasta to the air fryer basket. Cook for about 10 minutes or until golden brown on all sides.
